headline: Sands' New Chairman and CEO Outlines the Company's Strategic Priorities for Corporate Team Members
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / May 28, 2026 /Published by Las Vegas Sands on April 29, 2026 Sands' Chairman and CEO Patrick Dumont recently set the tone for his tenure at the helm of the company in a recent Town Hall for corporate Team Members. ...
